title: PMS VFM - Tropical Melamine 11" Plate Pack of 6 - Outdoor Living
features: Pack of 6: Firstly, this popular plate is great for all dining experiences, both inside and out! For instance, whether you’re camping or serving up lunch at home, this jungle design dish is absolutely ideal. Pack into your hamper or cool bag along with your snacks and drinks, for an instantly fabulous lunch.

Long Lasting: Secondly, this range of delightful dinnerware is made with high quality material and built to withstand the test of time. Melamine is an organic compound used to produce a type of sustainable resin plastic. Therefore, this pack of 6 Tropical Melamine 11" Plate is stronger and more hardwearing than ordinary plastic and ceramics.

Beautiful Details: Compared to boring white China, this colourful Tropical Melamine 11" Plate brings plants and nature to life! In exotic hues of pink, orange and green, this Outdoor Living collection is the epitome of summertime. Furthermore, Hand wash only, and so simple to wipe clean too.

Conscious Crockery: Besides being easy to wash, this dish is a reusable and eco-friendly alternative to disposable paper plates. Save money and use this rainforest inspired piece again and again! This pack of 6 measuring at approximately 11” or 28cm in diameter, it’s the perfect size for a dinner plate.

Holiday Fun: Firstly, there’s no better way to enjoy the warm weather than a family outing to the park or beach. Of course, you’ll need to bring a feast for all the family, and the plates and utensils to go with it. Indeed, no picnic is complete without the proper tableware, so be sure to purchase the full set of matching items!
